MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Luaimalae Pasene is present.
Attorney Bruce C. Wong representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-30-2012 is vacated.
